description: Station GE.KWP is failing to detect earthquakes because its trigger threshold is set too high. Update the 'trigOn' parameter for the 'HighThreshold' binding profile in the 'scautopick' module to 3.0 and apply the configuration changes to the system. Verify the fix by regenerating picks for the Noto earthquake using the archived waveform at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive/2024/GE/KWP/BHZ.D/GE.KWP..BHZ.D.2024.001 and writing the results to the database at mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp.
